message: Image generation failed. Story generation completed.
story: An opening image introduces a princess in a world full of possibility. A sudden problem interrupts a princess and creates a clear mission. A princess follows a clue into a striking new place. A difficult choice tests a princess when the journey becomes dangerous. A princess discovers the courage needed to change the outcome.
